kokoro-speakd

persistent Kokoro TTS daemon over a Unix socket — sub-500 ms warm-call latency for Claude Code hooks and shell pipelines.

python 3.11+kokoro-82m onnxunix socketmit
github.com/yolo-labz/kokoro-speakd
pattern
daemon + stdlib-only client over a Unix socket
trade-off
5–8 s cold model load vs. sub-500 ms warm-call latency
guardrails
preemption over queueing · lazy per-language pipelines · markdown strip
supply chain
